title: Lead Investment Banker at Niva Bupa

jsonLd.title: Lead Investment Banker at Niva Bupa
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Investment Banker with drive and ambition, Niva Bupa in Lucknow is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Niva Bupa:
Niva Bupa is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage credit risk assessment and loan appraisal processes
• Prepare annual reports and investor presentations
• Prepare MIS reports for senior management review
• Conduct due diligence for mergers, acquisitions, and investments
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Tally
• Proficiency in SAP FICO
• Proficiency in Power BI
• Proficiency in GST
• Proficiency in Bloomberg Terminal
• Proficiency in Credit Analysis
• Proficiency in Budgeting
• Proficiency in Due Diligence

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Annual performance appraisal
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Lucknow, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Niva Bupa!
